description: Vibecoding policy enforcement hooks. These hooks provide deterministic enforcement of system rules that were previously reliant on LLM instruction-following.

SessionStart.description: Check STOP_ALL guardian file before any agent work begins
SessionStart.comment: Enable when VS Code hooks feature exits Preview

PreToolUse.description: Block all tool use when STOP_ALL guardian is active
PreToolUse.comment: Enable when VS Code hooks feature exits Preview

PreToolUse.description: Block prohibited git commands (git add ., git add -A, git add --all)
PreToolUse.comment: Enable when VS Code hooks feature exits Preview

PreToolUse.description: Block destructive terminal commands (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, git reset --hard, etc.)
PreToolUse.comment: Enable when VS Code hooks feature exits Preview

Stop.description: Verify agent output summary contains required evidence (artifacts, confidence)
Stop.comment: Enable when VS Code hooks feature exits Preview

SubagentStop.description: Verify agent wrote to activeContext.md before completing
SubagentStop.comment: Enable when VS Code hooks feature exits Preview
